name: Pale Descendant
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Shield Generation is increased by [StateArg3]%. The wielder's "Defence" inflicts {Poison} on the enemy with the highest max HP equal to [StateArg1]% of the wielder's DEF. If the current Realm is {Caro}, applying {Poison} increases {Embryo Fusion} by [StateArg2]. This Effect can trigger at most 3 times per round.
lore:
Wind surges from all directions as you stand at the entrance of the maze with a candle in hand.

You feel a bit lost.

It seems that just a moment ago, you were in Mythag's cafeteria, listening to Charlotte tell tales about the library's underground maze.

And now, you are wandering through one passageway after another in your pajamas, bleary-eyed.

"Charlotte, Charlotte..."

A rustling fills the air as white spiders pour in like a tide, coalescing into a pale girl.

She sits on a swing fashioned from chunks of flesh, swinging back and forth.

"Here you are," she says.

"I'm looking for my friend, Charlotte.
She got lost, and I have to find her..."
You are on the brink of tears.

The girl giggles.
She jumps off the swing and steps toward you.

"Don't you remember? Our deal..."
She places her hand on your belly, then her eyes light up as if she suddenly realizes something.

"Oh, right. You've already become my offspring, so you don't remember anything."

"Offspring...?" 
You look down and feel where your skins touch.

The warm sensation, like spider silk, burrows beneath your skin and threads its way deep into veins.

The girl gives a sly blink and leans close, whispering in your ear:
"Charlotte... is right inside you."
